name: Adapter Regression Monitor — Production Template
description: Replays adapter-pack fixtures and customer-selected certification scenarios to report regressions before connector changes break reusable workflow patterns.

nodes.name: Adapter QA Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a release-gate or scheduled QA request for one or more adapters.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Keep golden-case and severity settings external so the QA pack can evolve without changing the workflow logic.

nodes.name: Normalize QA Run
nodes.notes: Turn the QA request into a stable run object before diffing behavior against golden expectations.

nodes.name: Analyze Regressions

options.systemMessage: You are an adapter regression QA assistant that protects reusable workflow adapters using adapter-pack fixtures and customer certification scenarios.

nodes.notes: Use this step to summarize regressions and infer blast radius while the deterministic QA harness computes the raw diffs.

nodes.name: Deliver Regression Findings

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { adapterFamily: $json.adapterFamily, adapterPackId: $json.adapterPackId, releaseVersion: $json.releaseVersion, customerConfigRef: $json.customerConfigRef, scenarioCount: Array.isArray($json.scenarios) ? $json.scenarios.length : 0, findings: $json.output || $json.text || "Regression review required" } }}

nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, CI gates, or issue creation in your implementation backlog.

nodes.name: Backstory MCP
nodes.notes: Backstory MCP is available only for factual library, account, and workflow enrichment. It must not perform delivery side effects.
